_note: A small, self-authored labeled corpus for Python/JS taint flows across backend, frontend (DOM XSS), and AI (insecure LLM output handling). It demonstrates that the analyzer reproduces the labeled source->sink flows and correctly leaves parameterized/sanitized/constant code alone. It is a FUNCTIONAL/regression check, not an independent accuracy benchmark: the rule packs and these cases were written together, so a good score is expected and is NOT evidence of real-world accuracy. The OWASP Benchmark (Java) remains the real, unrun test.
